series_metadata.series_title: Children's Trust Fund- Prevent Child Abuse Ohio
series_metadata.series_description: Records relating to Children’s Trust Fund activities as the Prevent Child Abuse America Ohio Chapter. Includes capacity building plan and e-mail and correspondence related to Ohio Chapter services, communications, public policy, and marketing. Marketing includes, but is not limited to newsletters, reports and Prevent Child Abuse Ohio materials and activities.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: in office ; Paper: in office
